visual_description: A man in a dark suit stands beside a silver car at night, holding a briefcase. He closes the car door and walks away from the vehicle, moving towards the right of the frame. The scene is dimly lit, with only a few distant lights illuminating the dark surroundings.
audio_description: A dramatic, suspenseful musical score plays, featuring a prominent brass section and a driving rhythm. The music creates a tense and urgent atmosphere.
